message.content:
@startuml
participant "Main" as Main
participant "creatFile" as creatFile
participant "createJava" as createJava
participant "createCSS" as createCSS

Main -> creatFile : **1** call function
Main ->> createJava : **2** callfunction
Main ->> createCSS : **3** callfunction
createCSS -->> Main : **4** new file created
createJava -->> Main : **5** new file created
creatFile -->> Main : **6** new file created
@enduml
